gigapan.description: A dime imaged with the Explorable Microscopy Microscope Adapter Kit.  This was 2128 images, with 4 images focus stacked for each position.  Apparently either adapter slipped initially or (more likely) I just got the top and bottom set wrong, cutting off the bottom of the dime.  The black background is a piece of fabric.  Next time I will try for a less textured background.
